°☆°☆°☆°☆°☆°☆°☆°☆°☆°☆°☆°☆°☆°☆°☆°

After a stressful day at RAD, you come back to the House of Lamentation per request by Asmodeus. Once you reached Asmodeus' room, he let you inside with a cheerful smile.

"Welcome to my humble abode, hon!" He said with a giggle. "Come, come! Let's bathe together so you can release the stress."

Asmodeus grabbed your hand, leading you to the bathroom that was connected to his room. Once you were both in there, he drew the water, filling the bathtub up. Once the water was warm enough, he pumped a few squirts of rose-scented bath foam, filling the bath with bubbles.

"Alright, hon, feel free to strip yourself and get right in! I made sure that the water's warm enough." Asmodeus smiled as he took his clothes off, revealing his flawless body.

As you stripped yourself of your clothing and got into the bath with Asmodeus, he carefully placed his hand on your arm, trailing his hand lightly up and down it. You two haven't even done anything yet, but he's already excited. He can't stop himself from touching your adorable body.
